title: Aurora, 33858, Palm Pals Chutney Cheetah, 5In, Soft Toy, Golden Brown & Black
features: Let's meet the Palm Pals Chutney Cheetah Soft Toy, the latest addition to Aurora's popular Palm Pals Collection. This adorable plush has a traditional cheetah pattern of golden brown colour with black spots and is filled with beans. It fits perfectly into your palm, making it great for small cuddling. A wonderful gift for any occasion!

The Chutney Cheetah is part of the Palm Pals Zoo collection. The Palm Pals range includes collections such as Craving, Pets, Critters, Aquatic, and many more. These plushies are all super gorgeous and irresistibly cute.

Palm Pals are cute, touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. They are part of our Eco-Friendly initiative, featuring inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic. Our hangtags are recyclable, and our cloth labels are made from recycled materials.

Suitable from birth, the Palm Pals Chutney Cheetah measures 13cm. Chutney Cheetah is a Strong, nimble, and fearless chap. Being in the presence of Chutney's strong confidence, you'll feel empowered to conquer it all. This fearless Chutney will surely win everyone's hearts!

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful plush and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
